prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words, no letters, no watermarks.

菜月昴/Subaru Natsuki from 愛x死x機器人/Love, Death & Robots.

A strikingly handsome young man in his late teens with an angular, sharp-jawed face of extraordinary beauty — high cheekbones, a straight narrow nose, and deep-set amber-gold eyes that carry an unsettling luminosity, as if light refracts through synthetic lenses beneath organic irises. His skin is pale porcelain with a faint bluish translucency along the temples and jawline, suggesting something not entirely human beneath the surface — subtle subcutaneous circuitry traces visible like ghostly veins when light catches them. His expression is hollow yet magnetic: lips slightly parted, brows drawn together in quiet existential anguish, the face of someone who has felt emotions that may not belong to them.

His hair is jet black, slightly disheveled and medium-length, with an asymmetric cut — longer strands falling over his right eye, shorter and jaggedly cropped on the left side, tips faintly streaked with oxidized copper-red as if rusted by the environment. Rain-damp and clinging to his forehead.

He wears a deconstructed dark charcoal jacket with an oversized collar, its surface a hybrid of worn leather and matte carbon-fiber plating — industrial yet organic, like armor grown rather than manufactured. Beneath it, a fitted black turtleneck with fine fracture-pattern seams glowing faintly in dim teal bioluminescence, resembling healed wounds or circuit paths. His left forearm is exposed, revealing a seamless mechanical prosthetic from elbow to fingertips — gunmetal grey with exposed micro-hydraulic joints and soft amber light pulsing at the wrist like a heartbeat. His right hand remains organic, pale and scarred.

Lower body: slim-cut black tactical pants with reinforced knee panels, utility straps hanging loosely at the thigh. Heavy boots with thick soles, scuffed and weathered, with faint rust-orange patina — the signature corrosion of the Rust Layer. A thin cable trails from his lower back like a vestigial tail, its end frayed and sparking intermittently with glitch-art static.

Around his neck hangs a single object on a thin wire: a small, cracked glass vial containing a swirl of pale luminous mist — a fragment of someone's consciousness, or perhaps his own.

Overall aesthetic: cyberpunk 2077 Night City style, Unreal Engine 5 ray-tracing rendering quality, rain-slicked surface reflections on his boots and jacket, dense neon holographic advertisement light spill casting magenta and cyan highlights across his form, high-contrast fluorescent color clashes, mechanical prosthetic fine detail, glitch art visual distortion effects subtly warping the edges of his silhouette, volumetric fog atmosphere, 16K ultra-high-definition quality, maximum futuristic technological presence, decadence intertwined with splendor. The character exists at the intersection of cold industrial ruin and tender organic vulnerability — a being grown from the fracture between worlds, beautiful and broken, standing perfectly still as if listening to a question he cannot answer.

菜月昴 / Subaru Natsuki / 愛x死x機器人 / Love, Death & Robots., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: cyberpunk
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
